recommendations.title: Fantozzi: White Collar Blues
recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.

recommendations.title: El mesero
recommendations.overview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.

recommendations.title: Cosy Dens
recommendations.overview: Two families, Sebkovi and Krausovi, are celebrating Christmas, but not everyone is in a good mood. The teenage kids think that their fathers are totally stupid, and the fathers are sure that their children are nothing more than rebels, hating anythin

recommendations.title: Lola
recommendations.overview: A bored young man meets with his former girlfriend, now a cabaret dancer and single mother, and soon finds himself falling back in love with her.

recommendations.title: Long Weekend
recommendations.overview: When a suburban couple goes camping for the weekend at a remote beach, they discover that nature isn't in an accommodating mood.

recommendations.title: Love on the Sidelines
recommendations.overview: A down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with an injury. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

recommendations.title: Mr. Know-It-All
recommendations.overview: A football coach afraid of commitment has to take care of his nephew with Asperger's Syndrome.

recommendations.title: Kedi
recommendations.overview: A profile of Istanbul and its unique people, seen through the eyes of the most mysterious and beloved animal humans have ever known, the Cat.

recommendations.title: I Served the King of England
recommendations.overview: Prague, Czechoslovakia, during the inter-war period. Jan Dítě, a young and clever waiter who wants to become a millionaire, comes to the conclusion that to achieve his ambitious goal he must be diligent, listen and observe as much as he can, be alway

recommendations.title: Do Not Expect Too Much from the End of the World
recommendations.overview: On behalf of a multinational company, a production assistant drives around the Romanian city of Bucharest, interviewing various citizens who have been injured due to work accidents to cast one of them in a “safety at work” video.
